sourceMovie.title: Sleepless
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Sleepless (2017) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Baran bo Odar's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Equalizer 3
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sleepless clicked for you, The Equalizer 3 (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Sleepless?
faq.answer: Try The Equalizer 3, RocknRolla, A Working Man—each shares DNA with Sleepless while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Sleepless?
faq.answer: Sleepless (2017) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Sleepless worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
